name: Jane Doe
text: LightHouse Roofing did an excellent job replacing our roof. The crew was professional, cleaned up thoroughly, and finished ahead of schedule.

name: Michael Torres
text: They showed up the same day I called about a leak. Tarped the roof and had it repaired within 48 hours. Honest pricing and great communication.

name: Susan Palmer
text: Very happy with our new gutters. The team was respectful of my garden and left the driveway cleaner than they found it.

name: David Kim
text: After the hail storm, LightHouse handled everything from inspection to insurance paperwork. Made a stressful situation much easier.

name: Angela Brooks
text: Best roofing experience we've had in 20 years of homeownership. Quality materials, skilled crew, and they stuck to the quote.

name: James Wilson
text: Good work on the flat roof section of our office building. Project took a day longer than expected, but the result was solid.

name: Rachel Nguyen
text: The crew replaced our roof in a single day. They explained every step and even took photos to show us the work. Highly recommend!
